_comment: Manual score corrections for matches where football-data.org's free tier reports a score that doesn't match reality (typically VAR-disallowed goals that the upstream didn't subtract). Keyed by football-data match id. The note shows up in the UI as a warning so it's clear a correction is in play.

537371.note: Spain vs Saudi Arabia — football-data reported 5-0; ESPN and reality say 4-0 (disallowed goal in stoppage time)
